title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates
company: Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates!
